text: This article shall be known and may be cited as the “Motor Vehicle Financial Responsibility Act”.

## Title 42
#### Article 7. Motor Vehicle Fin. Responsibility Law
##### § 42-7-101 — Short title

This article shall be known and may be cited as the “Motor Vehicle Financial Responsibility Act”.

subsections.text: This article shall be known and may be cited as the “Motor Vehicle Financial Responsibility Act”.
